creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Gabriel,

After the commit of v0.10.0 to ports on 2020-11-10 and the MFH on 2020-11-22 it is time now for an update to v1.3.0, isn't it?

In the meantime, v1.3.1 was released. I suggest to update the patch to the recent version before committing. What do you think?
